verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the unanimous agreement among all agents. The synthesis explicitly lists the hard constraints (LHT, English, Subtropical) and specific markers (blue signs, paling fences, Eucalyptus/Banana) that definitively point to Australia.
